contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Security dashboard fixes: empty sections, TLS scanner, squished table
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/168
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/169
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/23
  
  Details:
  Fixed the security dashboard at truesight.me/security-dashboard. Root cause of blank AWS/Web/GitHub sections was a key-name mismatch (Cypher-Defense compiler emits aws_inventory/web_security/github_security; dashboard read aws/web/github) — made the dashboard read both old and new names and handle the new headers.present object shape. Fixed the squished GitHub repo table: it renders inside a CSS grid, so its wrapper was confined to a single column; now spans all columns to fill the section width like the Web Security table. Fixed a TLS certificate parsing bug in the Cypher-Defense web scanner (issuer/subject are nested RDN tuples; dict() raised an error for every site) — verified the regenerated scan shows valid TLS with days-remaining for 7 of 8 sites. Reviewed prior fixes by the sophia agent and reported remaining infra gaps (AWS credential secrets resolve empty at runtime; GitHub branch-protection PAT scope; secret-scanning endpoint bug).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
